title: conyza undulata
intro: Conyza undulata, also known as undulated fleabane, is a plant species in the daisy family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Conyza undulata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. Conyza undulata is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves and roots are used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
